tasks.task_title: Assess and design: Output Module: Multi-Format Data Export

issues_found: Acceptance criteria not formalized - should define what constitutes 'proper' type serialization, 'proper' error handling, and passing validation
No identified risks - missing edge cases like type mismatch handling, encoding issues, large dataset performance, file I/O failures, circular references in data structures
Insufficient detail on unified data model - unclear what structure/types are being exported; affects task feasibility
Missing performance constraints - no mention of file size limits, memory usage expectations, or performance requirements
Task complexity/sizing not estimated - vertical slice definition requires effort estimates (1-14 days each)
Test coverage expectations undefined - no explicit mention of unit tests, integration tests, or validation test scope
File encoding handling not mentioned - critical for CSV/YAML/JSON exports across different locales
No explicit dependencies identified between tasks - task ordering and parallel work potential unclear

initiatives.initiative_title: Validation Module: Schema Definition and Data Validation

tasks.task_title: Assess and design: Validation Module: Schema Definition and Data Validation

issues_found: No acceptance criteria defined - each task lacks clear definition of done and success metrics
No risk identification - no identified risks, dependencies, or technical constraints
Schema language design approach unspecified - unclear if DSL, JSON, YAML, or other format; this is a critical design decision
Type consistency scope too vague - 'validate type compatibility across all pipeline stages' needs clear boundaries and priority
Missing non-functional requirements - no performance targets, error recovery strategy, or scalability constraints
Task sequencing ambiguous - dependency relationships and parallelization strategy not defined
No integration criteria - how validation module integrates with existing pipeline architecture not stated
Testing and documentation requirements missing - no mention of test coverage, integration tests, or user documentation
Error message design underspecified - 'actionable error reporting with recovery suggestions' needs detailed approach and examples
No stakeholder or approval information - unclear who approves completion and what their criteria are

initiatives.initiative_title: CLI and Integration: Command-Line Interface and Pipeline Orchestration

tasks.task_title: Assess and design: CLI and Integration: Command-Line Interface and Pipeline Orchestration

issues_found: No risks identified - must document technical risks (pipeline integration complexity), scheduling risks, and dependency risks
No acceptance criteria defined - must specify measurable completion criteria (e.g., CLI commands supported, error scenarios handled, test coverage %, command reliability thresholds)
Tasks lack complexity/sizing estimates - impossible to assess effort, timeline, or resource requirements
No explicit task dependencies or execution ordering - unclear if tasks have blockers or must be sequenced
Task 4 combines testing and documentation - should be decomposed into separate work items with distinct completion criteria
State management requirements unspecified - what state must be tracked? How is it persisted? What are race condition or consistency concerns?
Error handling scope not defined - what error types are in scope? What recovery patterns? User vs. system errors?
No quality thresholds or success metrics - test coverage targets, performance targets, or availability targets missing
